evidence: Runtime dispatch, per-tab state, session storage, hook registration and passive webRequest reviewed in full.
URL allowlist, bounded metadata traversal and chat normalization reviewed in full.
DOM and JSON scanning, profile fetch, player controls and page-message bridge reviewed in full.
MAIN-world WebSocket proxy, frame handling and error containment reviewed in full.
MV3 permissions, host scope, content scripts and lack of externally_connectable reviewed in full.
Protobuf parser, gzip path and decoder output handling reviewed in full.
Static presentation only; no URL loading or executable content.
Static extension page with only bundled script and stylesheet.
Remote values rendered with textContent; actions are explicit and fixed; exports are user-triggered.
